page_content:
AMST - American Studies

AMST101 Introduction American Studies (3 Credits)

Introduces students to the interdisciplinary field of American Studies

by examining concepts such as culture, identity, cultural practices, and globalization, as well as theories underlying these concepts. Engages key themes, especially constructions of difference and identity, cultures of everyday life, and America and the world.

Credit Only Granted for. AMST101 or AMST201.
